title: Aegis Template Index
description: Per-kind format index (manifest/template-index.json). Maps each template kind to the formats it ships and the default format. Read by the format-aware ${TEMPLATE} resolver and the Q2 user-choice prompt. Cross-checks beyond shape (path existence on disk, default present in formats, no-orphan-bodies, slot-body markers) are enforced by scripts/validate/template-index.mjs.

kinds.description: Map of kind name (kebab-case) to its format entry.

default.description: The format used when ${TEMPLATE:<kind>} is resolved without an explicit format. MUST be a key present in `formats` (enforced by the validator).

designOnly.description: When true, the kind ships as a design reference with no near-term producer — an expected orphan. The NAMED_ARTIFACT_TEMPLATE / producer-coverage validators do not warn that it lacks a producer. Optional; absence means a producer is expected.
